name: Parallel Research → Synthesize
description: Two researchers run in parallel on different angles of the topic, then a synthesizer combines their findings into a unified report. Demonstrates DAG fan-out: both research nodes list 'plan' as their only upstream, so they land in the same wave and execute concurrently via asyncio.gather. The synthesizer lists both as upstream, so it always waits for both before starting.

nodes.instruction: Read plan.md from the workspace. Focus on the PRIMARY research angle described in the plan (core facts, main findings, primary sources). Write your findings to notes/primary.md.
Read plan.md from the workspace. Focus on the SECONDARY / supporting angle described in the plan (context, counterpoints, related evidence). Write your findings to notes/secondary.md.
